message:
refactor: Use requantization for MoE draft instead of external download

Changed from auto-downloading external draft model (Qwen-0.5B) to
requantizing the same MoE model to Q2_K for speculation:

- Same tokenizer and architecture = better acceptance rate
- No surprise network requests during build
- User's model, just smaller quantization
- Q8_0 Mixtral (46GB) → Q2_K draft (~13GB)

Strategy: Q2_K draft on GPU → Original via batched Metal MoE
